title: Sync/release receipt
description: A record of one profile sync or release event, stored as catalog/receipts/<receipt_id>.json.

receipt_id.description: Must match the filename without extension. Recommended: <date>-<profile>-<type>.

source_commit.description: Agent Stack git commit SHA the sync/release was generated from.

validated.description: Whether scripts/validate.py passed before this receipt was recorded.

validator.description: Command used to validate, e.g. scripts/validate.py.
